intentAndPurpose.intent: Page-level width container. `fluid` grows with the viewport (default). `fixed` caps at --Grid-MaxWidth per platform and centers. `full-bleed` is edge-to-edge for hero sections and full-width media.

props.name: as
props.description: Polymorphic root element on web. Ignored on native.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Optional override for the max-width cap (applies only to `fixed`). Accepts a CSS length string (e.g. `'1200px'`) on web or a numeric pixel value on native. Defaults to `--Grid-MaxWidth`.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles. CSS on web; native ViewStyle is accepted via `as unknown` casts.

props.name: variant
props.description: Layout variant. - `fluid` (default): grows with viewport, always applies `--Grid-Margin`. Use for apps, dashboards, software tools — including ultra-wide (>1920). - `fixed`: capped at `--Grid-MaxWidth` per breakpoint, centered. Use for marketing pages, reading content, forms. - `full-bleed`: no margin, no cap — edge-to-edge. Use for hero sections, full-width media.
